rulings.Case Title: ROBERT JAMES HANSON VS. SEQUOIA VENTURES, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, June 20, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1, Defendant Frank M. Booth¿s amended motion to compel further responses to discovery: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45a.m., not 9:00a.m. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT JAMES HANSON VS. SEQUOIA VENTURES, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, June 20, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1, Defendant Frank M. Booth¿s motion to compel is off calendar as a duplicate entry. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: FRANK HENRY TANNER et al VS. 3M COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Teledyne Technologies Incorporateds Motion To Deem Its Requests For Admissions Admitted And Request For Monetary Sanctions.; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, June 20, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2, Defendant Teledyne Technologies, Inc.¿s motion to deem requests for admission admitted and request for sanctions is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (503/TLJ)
